text_original: Great app! easy to use, doesnt use a credit model, and has great customer service.
text_zh: 很棒的应用！使用方便，不采用积分模式，而且客服服务非常好。
reply_original: Thank you so much! We are thrilled to hear you enjoy our chat model and find the app easy to use. Providing top-notch customer service is always our priority. If you ever have questions or suggestions, feel free to reach us at support@fantachat.ai. Have fun creating magical memories with Fantasia!
reply_zh: 非常感谢！我们非常高兴听到您喜欢我们的聊天模型，并觉得这款应用简单易用。提供一流的客户服务始终是我们的首要任务。如果您有任何问题或建议，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。祝您与 Fantasia 一起创造奇妙回忆，玩得开心！
